introduction.title: Experience & Cuisine
introduction.subtitle: Feel the TOMO Atmosphere and Taste

col1.title: Experience
col1.subtitle: A Unique Atmosphere and Service
col1.body: Step into a space designed to feel alive. Natural wood, original artwork by Juri Art, and a warm, grounded atmosphere invite you to slow down. TOMO is a place to sit, enjoy a glass of wine, and and let the atmosphere do the rest.

col2.title: Cuisine
col2.subtitle: A Healthy Taste That You Will Love
col2.body: Everything on our menu is 100% natural. No shortcuts, no compromises. Our dishes are built around fresh, protein-rich ingredients with tomato, mozzarella, and pesto as the signature thread throughout. Food that's good for you — and tastes like it should.

testimonials.title: How does it Taste?
testimonials.subtitle: Don't take it from us - Hear what our customers say

reviews.text: The most incredible dining experience in Palma. The moss walls create such a unique vibe.
reviews.author: Sarah M.

reviews.text: Finally a place where healthy food actually tastes amazing. The pesto is out of this world!
reviews.author: Marc D.

reviews.text: A true sanctuary. I could sit here for hours. The art, the food, the people - everything is perfect.
reviews.author: Julia K.

reviews.text: Tomo has set a new standard for Santa Catalina. Premium yet so relaxed.
reviews.author: Thomas B.

reviews.text: I love the concept of eating well to live well. You can taste the quality in every bite.
reviews.author: Elena R.

reviews.text: The best mozzarella I've ever had outside of Italy. Highly recommended!
reviews.author: David S.

card1.title: Natural
card1.desc: 100% natural ingredients. No additives, just pure flavor.

card2.title: Health
card2.desc: Designed for longevity. High protein, nutrient-rich.

card3.title: Passion
card3.desc: Crafted with intention by chefs who care.

experience.title: A Place With Character
experience.desc: Icelandic and bun moss by MoosMoos — Art by Juri that you won't find anywhere else and Food that tastes like a guilty pleasure, but isn't.

concept.title: Healthy Meets Delicious
concept.subtitle: Where Healthy Tastes Like It Should
concept.body:
We started Tomo with a simple question: why does healthy food have to be boring? We believe eating well shouldn't taste like a sacrifice. So we built Tomo around one idea: 100% natural ingredients, zero compromises on flavor.

Our answer is on the menu — fresh, protein-rich dishes that feel indulgent but aren't. Tomato, mozzarella, pesto as the foundation. The rest is flavor without guilt. Not because it's good for you. Because it's good.

story.title: Our Story
story.desc: TOMO was born from a shared vision: food that makes sense. We believe in eating well to live well.

location.title: Visit Us
location.address:
Plaça de la Navegació, 17
Santa Catalina, Palma

journey.label: The Journey
journey.title: From Idea to Reality in 11 Months
journey.body:
Tomo started in March 2025 with a conversation between friends. By February 2026, we opened our first location in Santa Catalina, Palma de Mallorca.

What happened in between? A lot of late nights, a clear vision, and people who believed in it from day one. Tomo grew fast — not because we rushed, but because the idea made sense. Healthy, natural, delicious. It's what people want. We just made it real.

founders.label: The Founders
founders.title: The People Behind Tomo
founders.body:
Tomo was founded by Luc, Andreas, and Tom — three people with different backgrounds but one shared conviction: food should make you feel good. While eating it, and after.

We're not chefs. We're not investors. We're people who saw a gap and decided to fill it. Tomo is the result.

next.label: What's Next
next.title: This Is Just the Beginning
next.body:
Santa Catalina is our first chapter, not our last. TOMO is designed to grow — into new formats, new locations, and new ways to bring healthy food to more people.

We're not in a rush. But we're not standing still either.

footer.address: Plaça de la Navegació, 17, Santa Catalina, Palma
